scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core packages/data && npm run prepare:web-data && npm --workspace @detexify/web run build
scripts.build:web:static: tsc -b packages/core packages/data && npm --workspace @detexify/web run build
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:packages && npm run prepare:web-data && npm --workspace @detexify/web run dev
scripts.render:symbols: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace @detexify/data run render:symbols
scripts.validate:data: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace @detexify/data run validate:source
scripts.prepare:mac-web: npm run build && npm --workspace @detexify/data run prepare:mac-web
scripts.build:mac: npm run prepare:mac-web && cd apps/mac && swift build
scripts.release:mac: npm run package:mac && npm run notarize:mac && npm run release:github
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/data && npm --workspace @detexify/web run typecheck
